resources.string:
Send a message to create your first automation rule.

Examples:
• "When battery is low, set silent mode"
• "When charging starts, increase brightness"
• "When I enter Home zone, set vibrate"
No events captured yet.\nStart the runtime and grant permissions.
No zones added yet.\nTap + to add a geofence zone.
No rules yet.\nCreate rules via the Chat tab.
Allows Local AI Agent to monitor notifications for automation triggers
